findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests across 3 contract files (stickyNote 29, useGraphEvents 76, useDragConnect 35). Hardened performance-500-nodes flake (median→min, 8x→10x, sub-0.1ms short-circuit). 72 files / 2410 tests.

92 new tests in 2 contract files: graphMasteryLegend (18 — tier order, MASTERY_HEX wiring, a11y) and knowledgeGraph (74 — orchestrator: 8 composed hooks × 2 assertions, 5 sub-components × 2, conditional mount logic, ref-stabilized callbacks, mobile-hint storage key, multi-selection wiring, layout cycle, zoom-flash, combo grouping, a11y). Code quality: extracted devWarn helper to graphHelpers.ts and refactored 33 callsites across 14 files (KnowledgeGraph, useGraphInit, useGraphEvents, useGraphHighlighting, useEdgeReconnect, useDragConnect, useFullscreen, useSpacePan, useKeyboardNav, useMapUIState, useNodePositions, useUndoRedo, MiniKnowledgeGraph, ShareMapModal). Net: -33 duplications, +1 helper, +5 unit tests for the helper. Result: 74 files / 2507 tests, ALL PASSING. Phase 3/4 audits unchanged from cycle 16 — no new findings.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2507/2507 assertions pass; devWarn helper consolidates 33 DEV-warn callsites; orchestrator composition under contract test
